title: Power Electronics Engineer (0-3 Years)
company: n Human Resources & Management Systems [ nHRMS ]
description:
Job Title: Power Electronics Engineer

Experience: 0–3 Years
Employment Type: Full-Time

Job Description:

We are looking for a motivated Power Electronics Engineer (Fresher) to support the design, development, testing, and validation of power electronic systems. The role is ideal for candidates with strong fundamentals and a keen interest in power conversion technologies.

Key Responsibilities:


Assist in the design and development of power electronics circuits such as inverters, converters, SMPS, and rectifiers

Support testing, debugging, and validation of power electronics hardware

Perform basic simulations using tools like MATLAB/Simulink, PSpice, LTspice

Assist in component selection (IGBTs, MOSFETs, diodes, capacitors, magnetics)

Work with senior engineers on PCB testing, thermal analysis, and efficiency improvement

Prepare technical documentation, test reports, and BOMs

Coordinate with cross-functional teams during development and testing phases



Requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:


BE/BTech/MTech in Electrical or Power Electronics

Strong fundamentals in Power Electronics, Analog Circuits, Control Systems

Basic knowledge of DC-DC converters, AC-DC converters, and inverters

Familiarity with simulation and testing tools

Understanding of basic lab instruments (DSO, power analyzer, multimeter)

Good analytical and problem-solving skills

Good to Have:


Internship or academic project in power electronics or EV systems

Exposure to EV powertrain, chargers, or renewable energy systems

Basic knowledge of micro controllers /DSPs



Benefits

Why Join Us:


Hands-on learning and mentorship

Opportunity to work on real-world power electronics applications

Career growth in EV, renewable energy, and power systems

description:

Job Description & Summary
At PwC, our people in business application consulting specialise in consulting services for a variety of business applications, helping clients optimise operational efficiency. These individuals analyse client needs, implement software solutions, and provide training and support for seamless integration and utilisation of business applications, enabling clients to achieve their strategic objectives.

As a business application consulting generalist at PwC, you will provide consulting services for a wide range of business applications. You will leverage a broad understanding of various software solutions to assist clients in optimising operational efficiency through analysis, implementation, training, and support.

Job Description
Why PWC

At PwC, you will be part of a vibrant community of solvers that leads with trust and creates distinctive outcomes for our clients and communities. This purpose-led and values-driven work, powered by technology in an environment that drives innovation, will enable you to make a tangible impact in the real world. We reward your contributions, support your wellbeing, and offer inclusive benefits, flexibility programmes and mentorship that will help you thrive in work and life. Together, we grow, learn, care, collaborate, and create a future of infinite experiences for each other. Learn more about us.

At PwC, we believe in providing equal employment opportunities, without any discrimination on the grounds of gender, ethnic background, age, disability, marital status, sexual orientation, pregnancy, gender identity or expression, religion or other beliefs, perceived differences and status protected by law. We strive to create an environment where each one of our people can bring their true selves and contribute to their personal growth and the firm’s growth. To enable this, we have zero tolerance for any discrimination and harassment based on the above considerations.



Job Description & Summary: We are seeking an experienced Backend Developer  hands-on experience in Java and Spring Boot to design, develop, and maintain scalable backend systems and APIs. The ideal candidate will have strong problem-solving skills, a deep understanding of backend architecture, and experience working in Agile environments. 



Responsibilities: 

 


Design, develop, and maintain backend applications and RESTful APIs using Java and Spring Boot. 

Build and manage microservices-based architectures. 

Develop and expose secure, versioned RESTful APIs for frontend consumption and third-party integrations. 

Work closely with the database team to optimize queries and data transactions with PostgreSQL/EDB. 

Implement Java 21 best practices including updated concurrency models, records, and enhanced APIs. 

Integrate authentication/authorization mechanisms (e.g., Spring Security, OAuth2/JWT). 

Write unit and integration tests using JUnit, Mockito, or equivalent frameworks. 

Participate in code reviews, refactoring, and system optimization efforts. 

Build and manage microservices-based architectures. 

Develop secure, high-performance, and scalable server-side solutions. 

Integrate applications with databases, message queues, and third-party services. 

Collaborate with DevOps for CI/CD pipeline integration and containerized deployments. 

Support performance tuning, API monitoring, and production incident resolution. 

Collaborate with frontend developers, DevOps, QA, and product teams.  

Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve production issues 


 

Mandatory skill sets: 

 

development experience including springboot  

Strong proficiency in Java (Java 8+). 

Hands-on experience with Spring Boot, including: 

Spring MVC 

Spring Data JPA / Hibernate 

Spring Security 

Strong experience in building RESTful APIs and microservices. 

Experience with SQL databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL, Oracle). 

Hands-on experience with microservices architecture, REST API design, and PostgreSQL/EDB database interaction. 

Strong in Java 11–21, with knowledge of modern features and migration best practices. 

Familiarity with JPA/Hibernate, Spring Data, and SQL performance tuning. 

Experience with Spring Security, API gateway configuration, and token-based auth (JWT, OAuth2). 

Knowledge of message queues (Kafka/RabbitMQ) is a plus. 

Understanding of containerization (Docker), CI/CD, and deployment practices. 

 


Preferred skill sets: 

 

Strong problem-solving and analytical skills. 

Excellent communication and collaboration abilities. 

Ability to work independently and in a team-oriented environment.   


Years of experience required: 

Fresher  

Education qualification: 

BE/B.TECH/MCA or equivalent  


 




Education (if blank, degree and/or field of study not specified)
Degrees/Field of Study required: Bachelor in Business Administration

Degrees/Field of Study preferred:



Certifications (if blank, certifications not specified)



Required Skills
Java



Optional Skills
Accepting Feedback, Accepting Feedback, Active Listening, Analytical Reasoning, Application Software, Business Data Analytics, Business Management, Business Technology, Business Transformation, Communication, Documentation Development, Emotional Regulation, Empathy, Implementation Research, Implementation Support, Implementing Technology, Inclusion, Intellectual Curiosity, Optimism, Performance Assessment, Performance Management Software, Problem Solving, Product Management, Product Operations, Project Delivery {+ 11 more}

description:
Hiring 7 International training sales executives | Freshers only | Bangalore – Immediate!

 

Selected candidates will receive a Basic Salary + Commissions on every ticket they sell. Commissions are earned in Euros and paid in INR.

title: Sales Associate
description:
Location: Bangalore (Indiranagar)

Experience: Fresher to 2 Years




Job description:

Want to become a founder someday?

If you aspire to build your own company, lead a business unit, or become a startup operator, learning sales and customer understanding is the best place to start.

At Lane, this role will teach you how to:

Understand real customer problems
Learn how to sell and influence decisions
Develop strong storytelling and pitching skills
Think in terms of revenue and business growth
Solve problems in real time

Many great founders started in sales — because nothing teaches business faster than talking to customers every day.

If you’re curious, ambitious, and want to build something meaningful in the future, this role will give you a strong foundation.




About Lane

At Lane, we’re reimagining how India learns driving and experiences car ownership. From structured driving education to helping people buy their first car, we’re building a trusted mobility platform for first-time drivers.

With 15,000+ registrations and strong early traction, we’re expanding our team and hiring Sales Executives and Sales Interns in Bangalore to power our next phase of growth.

We’re looking for friendly, energetic, and people-loving individuals who enjoy talking to customers as much as closing deals.




What You’ll Do

Achieve sales targets and celebrate wins with the team
Greet customers warmly and assist them in selecting the right services
Handle customer inquiries and provide appropriate solutions
Own and manage the sales funnel from lead generation to conversion
Track and analyze funnel metrics to improve performance
Collaborate with sales and operations teams to improve efficiency
Drive revenue growth through data-driven sales execution




Who Should Apply

0–2 years of experience in sales, business development, or customer success
Strong communication and problem-solving skills
Motivated to grow in a high-performance startup environment

Sales experience is great — but attitude and hunger to learn matter even more.




What’s On Offer

Attractive incentives in addition to fixed pay
10-day onboarding and sales training program
Be part of a fast-scaling mobility startup
Real career growth opportunities

title: Chartered Accountant (Fresher)
description:
We are looking for dynamic CA Freshers to join Ola’s Finance team across multiple verticals such as FP&A, Controllership, Business Finance, and Taxation. The role offers exposure to end-to-end finance operations, business partnering, financial management, and cross-functional collaboration in a fast-paced environment.




Key Responsibilities:

Support budgeting, forecasting, and monthly financial performance analysis.
Conduct variance analysis and assist in preparing management reporting decks.
Perform accounting activities including reconciliations, journal entries, and month-end close tasks.
Assist in audit preparation, documentation, and compliance activities.
Partner with business teams to analyse costs, revenue, profitability, and operational efficiencies.
Support financial modelling, scenario planning, and KPI tracking.
Assist in treasury operations such as cash flow management, banking coordination, and investment documentation.
Conduct process reviews, identify gaps, and support internal audit activities.
Prepare data packs, dashboards, and analysis for leadership decision-making.
Work with cross-functional teams to support strategic and operational finance initiatives.




Key Requirements:

Chartered Accountant (CA) – recently qualified
Strong understanding of financial statements, accounting concepts, and Ind-AS.
Proficiency in MIS reporting, Excel (advanced functions), and large dataset analysis.
Working knowledge of ERP systems and finance tools preferred.
Good communication and stakeholder management skills.
High attention to detail with strong problem-solving ability.
Ability to adapt to a fast-paced environment and take ownership of tasks.

title: Wedding Designer
description:
About Meragi

Meragi is a rapidly growing start-up in India's thriving $50 billion wedding industry. As a technology-enabled wedding services provider, we are revolutionizing the way wedding-related services are bought and delivered. Our mission is to create industry-first solutions that address the complexities of this space by leveraging innovative technology to consult, design, and deliver wedding services with a strong focus on quality fulfillment. Backed by top-tier investors, we are at the forefront of transforming the wedding industry. We are looking for dynamic and growth-oriented individuals to help design dream weddings for our customers.

Role Overview

We are looking for a design-oriented, people-loving fresher to join us as a Wedding Designer. This is a front-facing, hands-on role where you will be stationed at one of our wedding venues and own the end-to-end design and experience journey for couples. If you come from a background in interior design, architecture, fashion design, or a related creative field, and enjoy seeing your ideas come to life, this role is for you.

Roles & Responsibilities


Welcome and host clients, conduct venue tours, and explain services clearly
Understand client requirements and design décor, menu, and overall wedding setup
Work with internal teams and vendors to ensure smooth coordination
Manage timelines and maintain clear communication with clients
Take ownership on the event day and ensure seamless execution and client satisfaction
Who this role is for
Background in Interior Design, Architecture, Fashion Design, or similar fields
Strong visual sense and attention to detail
Comfortable interacting with clients and presenting ideas
Organised, calm, and excited to work on live events
Willing to work on-site at wedding venues


What You Will Get


Fixed CTC + uncapped incentives
Hands-on exposure to design, client handling, and live events
Opportunity to see your ideas come to life at real weddings
Fast learning across design, hospitality, and execution
Clear growth path into senior design, planning, or experience roles

title: ServiceNow Admin
description:
What Success Looks Like In This Role


Gains familiarity with Maintenance & Support (M&S) Engineering concepts, practices and methodologies.
With guidance, performs and/or assists with standard support requests, including:


 o Identifying, recording and classifying problems of low complexity and impact,

 o Investigating and diagnosing identified problems, proposing changes for problem resolution,

 o Detecting, recording and classifying incidents and initial support, investigation, diagnosis, resolution / recovery and closure,

 o Formulating and testing of proposed incident resolutions (with assigned M&S team members), and

 o Integrating updates, fixes and change requests within the client environment,


Follows established escalation procedures for difficult or unusual incidents.
Documents own tickets and contributes to technical document preparation, FAQs and release notes.
Contributes to root cause analysis and change recommendations.
Learns and adheres to industry and company M&S Engineering standards.


You will be successful in this role if you have:

We are looking for a motivated ServiceNow Administrator (Fresher) with 0–2 years of experience and certification. This role involves client-facing interactions, so strong communication skills are essential along with basic ServiceNow knowledge.

Key Responsibilities


Assist in administration and maintenance of the ServiceNow platform
Configure and support modules like Incident, Problem, and Change Management
Handle service requests and resolve basic platform issues
Manage users, roles, and access controls
Work on workflows, business rules, and UI policies
Interact with clients/stakeholders to understand requirements and provide support
Provide timely updates and status reports to clients
Collaborate with internal teams for enhancements and issue resolution
Maintain proper documentation of tasks and processes


Required Skills


Strong communication and interpersonal skills (mandatory – client-facing role)
Basic understanding of ITSM processes
Knowledge of ServiceNow platform/navigation
Good analytical and problem-solving abilities
Ability to handle client queries professionally


Qualifications


Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, IT, or related field
Mandatory: ServiceNow Certified System Administrator (CSA) certification

title: Student Engagement Executive
description:
Description




Role Overview :




We are looking for a proactive and customer-focused Operations Associate to manage student onboarding, engagement, and support. This role is critical in ensuring a seamless post-admission experience, handling multi-channel student interactions, and actively driving referral participation and conversions.




The ideal candidate should be highly responsive, capable of building strong student relationships, and comfortable working in a fast-paced, dynamic environment.




Key Responsibilities

1. Student Onboarding

● Manage end-to-end onboarding of new students

● Ensure a smooth and positive onboarding experience

● Guide students through processes, tools, and expectations




2. Student Engagement & Community

● Participate in student engagement initiatives

● Foster meaningful interaction within the student community

● Improve participation and overall satisfaction levels




3. Customer Support

● Handle student queries via calls, WhatsApp, and email

● Provide timely, accurate, and empathetic resolutions

● Maintain high responsiveness and service quality




4. Referral Generation & Conversion

● Pitch referral programs effectively to students

● Drive referral participation and conversions

● Track and optimize referral performance




5. Retention & Relationship Management

● Build and maintain strong student relationships

● Identify at-risk students and take proactive action

● Improve student retention and overall experience




Apna Transforming Careers Through Technology




Since 2019, apna has connected over 60 million jobseekers with more than 250,000 enterprises and small businesses across India. Founded by Nirmit Parikh, a Stanford graduate and serial entrepreneur who recognized the challenges in entry-level hiring, apna has rapidly grown to become India's fastest unicorn in 2021—achieving this milestone in just 21 months.




Backed by marquee global investors - Insight Partners, Tiger Global, Lightspeed India, Sequoia Capital, and GSV, we're revolutionizing livelihood creation across India.




apna advantage - Education with Guaranteed Outcomes We're expanding beyond job matching with our new EdTech vertical that delivers:

1. Premium Online Education: Partnerships with top-tier universities offering UGC-accredited undergraduate and postgraduate programs

2. Career Success Ecosystem: Leveraging our network of 700,000+ recruiters to provide real job interviews

3. Personalized Career Journeys: Dedicated career facilitators, AI-powered job preparation tools, and guaranteed interviews




Requirements




● 1+ years of experience in student engagement / customer support / operations

● Strong communication and relationship management skills

● Ability to handle multi-channel communication (calls, WhatsApp, email)

● High ownership, responsiveness, and problem-solving ability

● Strong capability to pitch referral programs and drive conversion

Preferred Candidate Profile

● Proficiency in English, Hindi, and Kannada/Tamil (mandatory)

● Additional South Indian languages (Tamil, Telugu, Malayalam) are a strong advantage

● Energetic, proactive, and customer-first approach

● Comfortable working in a fast-paced environment

● Preference for a female candidate, considering team dynamics and student interaction requirements

title: Senior Finance Specialist - GA
description:
The Opportunity

The selected candidate will play a key role in supporting the financial reporting processes, general ledger accounting, lease accounting, and the record-to-report (R2R) cycle. This position offers an excellent opportunity to begin your career in a global organization renowned for its commitment to innovation, sustainability, and excellence.

How You’ll Make An Impact


Assist in the preparation of monthly, quarterly, and annual financial statements in compliance with accounting standards and company policies.
Support day-to-day general ledger (GL) accounting activities, including journal entries, reconciliations, and account analysis.
Participate in lease accounting processes, ensuring accurate recording and compliance with applicable accounting standards (e.g., Ind AS 116).
Contribute to the end-to-end Record to Report (R2R) process, including closing activities and reporting deliverables.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to resolve accounting issues and support internal and external audits.
Maintain proper documentation and adhere to internal controls and compliance requirements.
Address and resolve audit queries, including those related to the Companies (Auditor’s Report) Order (CARO), to ensure adherence to regulatory requirements and maintain audit readiness.
Responsible to ensure compliance with applicable external and internal regulations, procedures, and guidelines.
Living Hitachi Energy’s core values of safety and integrity, which means taking responsibility for your own actions while caring for your colleagues and the business.


Your Background


Chartered Accountant recently cleared/fresher with strong knowledge and understanding of Indian Accounting Standards (Ind AS), financial reporting, and general accounting principles.
Proficient in Microsoft Office Suite
Prior working experience in SAP is added advantage.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with a solution-oriented mindset.
Ability to work with large sets of data and effectively manage deadlines and prioritize in a dynamic, fast-paced environment.
Strong teamwork & communication.


Hitachi Energy is a global technology leader in electrification, powering a sustainable energy future through innovative power grid technologies with digital at the core. Over three billion people depend on our technologies to power their daily lives.

With over a century in pioneering mission-critical technologies like high-voltage, transformers, automation, and power electronics, we are addressing the most urgent energy challenge of our time – balancing soaring electricity demand, while decarbonizing the power system.

Headquartered in Switzerland, we employ over 50,000 people in 60 countries and generate revenues of around $16 billion USD. We welcome you to apply today.

title: Chartered Accountant
description:
Job Profile – Finance Executive / Assistant Finance Manager (CA Fresher)Position Details
Job Title: Finance Executive / Assistant Finance Manager
Qualification: Chartered Accountant (CA – Fresher)
Industry: Real Estate / Construction
Reporting To: Finance Manager / CFO
Employment Type: Full-time
Role Objective

To support the finance operations of real estate projects by handling day-to-day accounting, statutory compliance, MIS preparation, and coordination, while gaining hands-on exposure to project finance, RERA, and GST under senior supervision.

Key Responsibilities (CA Fresher–Friendly)Accounting & Book Closure
Maintain books of accounts for projects and group entities
Assist in monthly/quarterly closures
Support revenue recognition workings under guidance
Reconcile bank, vendor & customer balances
GST & Tax Compliance (Execution Role)

GSTR-1, GSTR-3B
ITC reconciliation (2B vs books)
Track RCM applicability for contractors
Assist in TDS computation & returns
Support responses to GST / IT notices
RERA & Project Compliance Support

Cost vs budget
Cash flow statements
Receivables aging
Support management presentations and dashboards
Vendor, Billing & Payment Support

Coordinate with Purchase & Project teams

Skills & Learning Expectations
Strong fundamentals in Accounting, GST & Income Tax

title: Real Estate Sales fresher
description:
Company Description

Brickfolio Pvt. Ltd. is a full-service real estate consultancy firm specializing in residential and commercial real estate, property management, and corporate relocation. With a dedicated team of skilled professionals, we provide tailored guidance to meet the unique needs of property investors, homebuyers, and businesses. Our comprehensive services include investment advisory, property leasing, and real estate management, all focused on maximizing returns for our clients. Located in Pune, Maharashtra, Brickfolio stands out for its client-centric approach and commitment to excellence in the real estate sector.

Role Description

This is a full-time, on-site role for a Real Estate Sales professional, based in Bengaluru. The responsibilities include assisting clients in residential and commercial property transactions, building and maintaining client relationships, preparing and delivering effective sales presentations, and conducting market research. The candidate will also be required to understand client needs and guide them in making informed real estate decisions.

Qualifications


Possess relevant credentials, including a Real Estate License and knowledge of real property management processes
Strong expertise in Real Estate and Sales, with a passion for helping customers achieve their property goals
Exceptional Customer Service skills to foster client relationships and deliver a seamless buyer experience
Excellent communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills
Ability to work effectively in an on-site setting and thrive in a target-driven environment
Familiarity with the Bengaluru real estate market is a plus
Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Real Estate, or a related field is preferred

title: Fresher- Recruitment Trainee
description:
Position: Fresher- Recruitment Trainee

Locations: Bangalore

Job Type: Full Time

Work Type: Onsite

Shift Timing: Night Shifts

Timing: 6:30 PM to 3:30 AM IST (Monday to Friday)

Transportation: Both Pick and Drop




Overview




TekWissen Group is a workforce management provider throughout India and many other countries in the world.




Job Description:




We are hiring passionate and motivated fresh graduates who are eager to build a career in US IT Recruitment.
As a US IT Recruiter, you will be responsible for sourcing, screening, and submitting potential candidates for various IT positions with our clients in the United States.
You will work closely with Account Managers and delivery leads to understand client requirements and ensure timely and quality submissions.
This is a full-time onsite position designed to train and mold freshers into skilled recruitment professionals in the highly dynamic US staffing industry.

Responsibilities:

Understanding Client Requirements (IT or Non-IT)
Regularly interact with Account Managers and Team Leads to get complete clarity on job requirements.
Understand the technical and functional aspects of each job role (skills, experience level, domain, and location).
Prioritize open requisitions based on urgency and importance.

Candidate Sourcing & Screening:

Use various sourcing channels such as job portals (Dice, Monster, CareerBuilder, etc.), LinkedIn, internal databases, networking, and referrals.
Perform keyword searches and Boolean searches to identify suitable profiles.
Screen candidates through phone/video interviews to evaluate communication skills, technical capabilities, availability, and salary expectations.
Ensure a high level of candidate quality before submission.

Resume Submission & Coordination:

Format and present resumes professionally before sharing with the Account Manager or client.
Maintain a quick turnaround time for candidate submissions to meet tight deadlines.
Follow up regularly with candidates to ensure their availability and interest.
Coordinate interviews between candidates and clients; track feedback and results.

Recruitment Tools & Documentation:

Maintain accurate records of candidate details, job status, and communication history using Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS).
Update internal databases and track candidate progress throughout the recruitment lifecycle.

Required Skills & Qualifications:

Education: Bachelor's degree (Any discipline).
Excellent communication skills is a must (spoken and written English).
Strong interpersonal skills, positive attitude, and willingness to learn.
Ability to multitask, prioritize, and work in a fast-paced environment and Proficient in using MS Office tools.




TekWissen Group is an equal opportunity employer supporting workforce diversity.

title: Sales Associate (Fresher Hiring) in Mumbai, Agra, Dehradun
description:
Key Responsibilities


Connect with parents and adult learners to schedule high-impact 1:1 video counseling sessions
Deliver consultative, value-driven counseling by understanding needs, handling objections, and guiding prospects toward enrollment
Own and manage the entire sales lifecycle—from initial interaction to final conversion—ensuring timely follow-ups and successful closures


Why Sales at PlanetSpark is a Game-Changer


High-intent leads only: Engage with prospects who have already attended a demo—no cold calling, better conversion opportunities
World-class sales training: Benefit from expert-led training, live coaching, and mentorship from top performers
Fast-track career growth: Unlock rapid promotions and performance-based salary hikes
Recognition-focused culture: Get rewarded through regular incentive programs and recognition for top achievers
Unlimited earning potential: Earn uncapped incentives with no limits on your success.


About Company: PlanetSpark is on a mission to build the next generation of confident speakers and creative writers. We are a global company impacting over 11 countries through live 1:1 personalized classes on public speaking and creative writing through handpicked top 1% of teachers. Our kids participate in gripping debates, create viral YouTube videos, start their podcast channels, perform stand-up comedy, write nail-biting mystery stories, and become confident and fearless speakers. PlanetSpark is on its journey to becoming the global leader in the large and untapped communication skills segment. We are a 'Series-A' startup funded by some top VCs and are on a 30% month-on-month growth curve. We have our footprint in India, the Middle East, North America, and Australia. Come join a passionate team of over 500 young and energetic members and 400+ expert and handpicked teachers on this roller coaster ride to build the most loved brand for kids who will move the world.

title: Videographer (Fresher)
description:
Videographer (Fresher)

Company: Innovative Digital Lab

Location: Gurgaon (On-site)

Job Type: Full-Time




About the Company

Innovative Digital Lab is a growing digital marketing agency based in Gurgaon, specialising in SEO, PPC, social media marketing, content strategy, and web development. The agency works with clients across industries to drive brand growth and lead generation through digital channels. 




Role Overview

We are looking for a creative and enthusiastic Videographer (Fresher) who is passionate about content creation, shooting, and storytelling. You will work closely with the marketing and creative team to produce engaging video content for social media, ads, and client campaigns.




Key Responsibilities

• Shoot high-quality videos for:

Social media (Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, ads)

Client campaigns and brand shoots

• Assist in planning video concepts, storyboarding, and scripting

• Handle camera setup, lighting, and audio recording

• Edit videos using tools like Adobe Premiere Pro / After Effects / CapCut

• Capture behind-the-scenes and office culture content

• Collaborate with designers, marketers, and content team

• Stay updated with latest content trends and reel formats




Requirements

• Fresher or up to 1 year of experience

• Basic knowledge of iPhone shooting, Camera handling (DSLR/Mirrorless preferred) and Video editing software

• Strong interest in social media content creation

• Creative mindset with attention to detail

• Willingness to learn and experiment

• Ability to work in a fast-paced agency environment




Good to Have

• Experience with Instagram Reels / YouTube content

• Basic knowledge of motion graphics

• Understanding of ad creatives and branding

• Portfolio or sample work (even personal projects)




What You’ll Get

• Hands-on experience working with real brands

• Exposure to digital marketing campaigns

• Creative freedom to experiment with content

• Friendly and fast-paced work environment

• Growth opportunities within the agency




Send your resume + portfolio to:

info@innovativedigitallab.in

title: PROJECT MANAGER L1
description:
Job description:

Job Description


Role 

The purpose of the role is to manage delivery of a project driving operations and delivery governance, ensuring right talent supply chain to optimize customer satisfaction and cost of delivery

͏

Do

- Delivery Management
- Ensure seamless delivery of the projects 
- Deploy optimum project delivery structure post transition/ migration phase by evaluating the budget, costs, risks and staffing requirement 
- Create quarterly project charter with well-defined weekly project trajectory as per the project specifications & requirements and ensure 100% adherence in terms of schedule, quality, efforts and costs 


- Ensure 100% compliance to Project SLAs, information security protocols and etc (all customers contractual obligations)
- Monitor and take appropriate actions on internal and external audit findings to ensure no major non-compliance/ deviation from the SLA
- Liaise between customer and internal technical delivery team to drive project health by adhering to organizational norms of project metrics
- Drive various project related audits like quality, customer, ISO etc and ensure zero non-compliance
- Conduct periodic cadence with the quality team to take proactive measures to resolves issues/ possible escalations
- Conducts periodic cadence with Workforce Management Group (WMG) to ensure 100% fulfillment as per the program/ project requirement
- Regularly audit quality (QA) status of delivery and engage QA team to ensure adherence to Quality Assurance standards and processes
- Maintain project structure in Confluence & SAP in line with prevailing business requirements and norms
- Ensure expected ramp down (ERD) compliance as committed in MSA

- Client Relationship Management
- Engage with client to deploy opportunities to deploy multiple solutions within/ across SLs to create a stronger value proposition for clients
- Conduct regular customer connects (meetings/ visits/ video- conference) and participate in Management Review Meetings (MRM) with client management/engagement managers to understand customers current and future needs and seek feedback to improve delivery methodology/ timelines/ resource allocation

- Identify and close early warnings on a project to avoid any customer escalations
- Plan and conduct Quarterly Business Reviews (QBR) along with DMs/ ADH with the client management/ leadership team to drive improvement actions and mine for a new portfolio/ opportunity within the account
- Design and monitor project performance dashboards/ reports with the clients periodically

- Delivery governance across the project
- Create weekly/ monthly/ quarterly MIS and reports to monitor and track overall project
- Conduct periodic reviews with the delivery team on operational, quality and fulfillment parameters and new idea generation & its implementation on existing projects

- Identify and resolve potential risks or early warning signs on project delivery to drive for ZERO surprise escalations and eliminate any revenue leakage
- Escalate any deviations from the project charter to the delivery managers in terms of schedule, effort, cost, infrastructure from the project charter and minimize process exceptions and such deviations from the actual project plan
- Review and monitor revenue allocations/ realization to avoid OB revenue leakage
- Provide inputs to delivery leadership team on overall delivery performance parameters (project heath, utilization, realization etc) at project/ program level during reviews highlighting any critical project escalations and potential risks

͏

- Operational Excellence
- Automation Focus
- Perform pareto analysis as per the no. of incidents received and accordingly identify automation opportunities and drive value adds across the project
- Deploy next generation hyper automation and crowdsourcing initiatives in coordination with Holmes RO team to enhance productivity, quality and speed of delivery


- Interact and engage with tools team to bring in new tools in the project to automate certain pointers/ elimination of any noise in the project

- Innovation Focus
- Brainstorm with the team to identify improvement opportunities and initiatives to further improve quality, delivery speed and productivity parameters
- Drive value adds and BVMs; ensure management showcases them to customer in MRM & QBR to drive growth

- Plan and conduct periodic idea campaigns to generate new solutions to the problems/ define better ways of working

- Drive and deploy Knowledge Management and sharing 
- Contribute in internal knowledge sharing initiatives at Wipro by driving internal training sessions, best practices, learnings, value adds and BVMs and deploys best practices in various projects within own account
- Deploy the Wipro's knowledge management portal across the account and monitor & track trainings

- Capability Development and Talent Pipeline Creation
- Demand forecasting in line with business requirements 
- Anticipate attrition and ensure right talent supply chain to deliver the project
- Spearhead quarterly demand forecasting and resource planning aligned to project requirements


- Create and deploy a workplan to fulfil the required demand from all the talent channels including external (lateral, contractors etc) hiring in coordination with WMG/ CWMG and Talent Acquisition team
- Anticipate new skills/ upcoming technologies required to deliver the project and ensure the team is trained or right talent is inducted into the project as per the skill requirements

- Drive 100% compliance on trainings and upskilling requirements 
- Prioritize and identify essential and upcoming technical skills required across programs/ projects to facilitate and drive right supply chain
- Drive towards 100% mandatory training compliance for the target population within an account

- Plan and drive rotations for seed positions and ensure replacement plan to be arrived ahead of rotations
- Quarterly connect with critical talent to understand their career aspirations and create their learning maps along with project managers and HRBP

- Fresher engagement program
- Ensure a stable arrangement and assimilation of rookie within accounts in coordination with competency group team (classroom trainings/ e-learning, certifications, on the job training etc)

- Team Management
- Resourcing
- Forecast talent requirements as per the current and future business needs
- Hire adequate and right resources for the team

- Talent Management
- Ensure adequate onboarding and training for the team members to enhance capability & effectiveness
- Build an internal talent pool and ensure their career progression within the organization


- Manage team attrition
- Drive diversity in leadership positions
- Performance Management
- Set goals for the team, conduct timely performance reviews and provide constructive feedback to own direct reports
- Ensure that the Performance Nxt is followed for the entire team

- Employee Satisfaction and Engagement
- Lead and drive engagement initiatives for the team
- Track team satisfaction scores and identify initiatives to build engagement within the team

- Facilitate rewards and recognition to acknowledge the high performers in the team
 

͏

Deliver

 
1.
 
Delivery Management ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢Â‚Â¬Ã¢Â€Âœ Client satisfaction
 
PCSAT, Brand score, no. of customer references, SDR/ QBR %, Pulse % satisfied (top 2 box), Zero surprise delivery escalation from the customer, adherence to project charter
 
2.
 
Delivery Management ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢Â‚Â¬Ã¢Â€Âœ operational efficiency
 
Contractual adherence %, Quality index, Utilization %, cost of delivery target, overdue indent, 100% SLA compliance, PEI % target, 100% usage of click to bill, % SAP loss for T&M projects
 
3.
 
Delivery Management ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢Â‚Â¬Ã¢Â€Âœ Financials
 
Revenue target achievement, Operating margin %, leakage from OB to revenue, revenue per employee, CR realization target, process exceptions to be minimized, bench cost % of total cost, underrun % target for FPP projects, effort saving through NG-1, NG-2 initiatives
 
5.
 
Capability Building
 
% attrition, critical talent attrition%, % trained on new age skills, % of team trained in necessary behavioural skills, diversity ratio, % localization targets by market, billable rookie ratio, rookie/NJNB assimilation TATs, offshore mix
 
6.
 
Team Management
 
Team attrition %, Employee satisfaction score
 

͏

Mandatory Skills: Project Management ASM .

 

Experience: 8-10 Years
.

 

Reinvent your world. We are building a modern Wipro. We are an end-to-end digital transformation partner with the boldest ambitions. To realize them, we need people inspired by reinvention. Of yourself, your career, and your skills. We want to see the constant evolution of our business and our industry. It has always been in our DNA - as the world around us changes, so do we. Join a business powered by purpose and a place that empowers you to design your own reinvention.

title: Graduate
description:
Overview

WELCOME TO SITA

We're the team that keeps airports moving, airlines flying smoothly, and borders open. Our tech and communication breakthroughs are the foundation of the global air travel industry.

You'll find us at 95% of international hubs. We partner closely with over 2,500 transportation and government clients, each with their own unique needs and challenges. Our goal is to find fresh solutions and cutting-edge tech to make their operations run like clockwork. Want to be a part of something big?

Are you ready to love your job? The adventure begins right here, with you, at SITA.

About The Role & Team

SITA India is on the lookout for recent graduates to join our SkyStar Program within the Procurement function, initially for a 12-month period, with the potential for a permanent role.

Role

Your main tasks will involve supporting the manufacturing procurement and the sourcing specialists and provide supporting data and MI to create more informed procurements as well as play a hands-on role in direct sourcing activity, obtaining quotes, supporting RFx`s and E Sourcing initiatives, providing assistance under supervision of the Manufacturing Procurement lead, and ensuring the smooth operation of procurement. This entry-level opportunity offers a chance to dive into various activities within our fast-paced global community:


Connecting with Diverse Individuals: Collaborate locally and globally.
Building Skills for Your Career: Develop essential skills tailored to your job stream.
Joining Corporate Projects: Contribute to projects shaping the future of our industry.


Early career talent is our future, and we're thrilled to have you join impactful missions alongside our experts, gaining valuable experiences. We can't wait to witness the incredible things you'll accomplish with us!

Empowered People, Reinventing Travel

What You’ll Do


Support Operative Project Procurement by assisting in day‑to‑day purchasing activities for ongoing projects, including data preparation, order follow‑up, supplier coordination, and documentation management
Collaborate with project managers and engineering teams to ensure materials and services are procured in line with project timelines, specifications, and quality requirements.
Follow up with suppliers on project‑critical deliveries, order confirmations, documentation requests, and issue resolution to support smooth project execution.
Support procurement transformation initiatives, contributing to process improvements, digital tools adoption, standardization, and increased operational efficiency within the Procurement team.
Ensure compliance with internal procurement policies, documentation standards, and approval workflows while maintaining accurate records.


Qualifications

KNOWLEDGE & SKILLS


Strong analytical skills with attention to detail
Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Excel, PowerPoint, Word)
Ability to learn quickly and work in a dynamic team environment
High level of motivation, curiosity, and willingness to take initiative
Basic understanding of procurement, supply chain, or manufacturing processes
Knowledge of e‑sourcing tools or ERP platforms


Education & Qualifications


Bachelor’s degree in supply chain management, Business Administration, Engineering, Commerce, or a related field.


What We Offer

We're all about diversity. We operate in 200 countries and speak 60 different languages and cultures. We're really proud of our inclusive environment. Our offices are comfortable and fun places to work, and we make sure you get to work from home too. Find out what it's like to join our team and take a step closer to your best life ever.

🏡 Flex Week: Work from home up to 2 days/week (depending on your team's needs)

⏰ Flex Day: Make your workday suit your life and plans.

🌎 Flex-Location: Take up to 30 days a year to work from any location in the world.

🌿 Employee Wellbeing: We have got you covered with our Employee Assistance Program (EAP), for you and your dependents 24/7, 365 days/year. We also offer Champion Health - a personalized platform that supports a range of wellbeing needs.

🚀 Professional Development: At SITA, we believe growth fuels innovation. Our learning ecosystem offers access to world-class platforms and programs designed to help you thrive. From LinkedIn Learning, Microsoft's Enterprise Skills Initiative, and Airport Council International -available to all employees-to specialized solutions like Pluralsight for technology upskilling, Harvard Business Publishing for people leadership, Stanford for strategic development and many others, we align learning opportunities with your Development Plan and our business priorities. Your development journey is supported every step of the way.

🙌 Competitive Benefits: Competitive benefits that make sense with both your local market and employment status.

SITA is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We value a diverse workforce. In support of our Employment Equity Program, we encourage women, aboriginal people, members of visible minorities, and/or persons with disabilities to apply and self-identify in the application process.
Show more

title: Chartered Accountant - Fresher
description:
Crest Ventures Limited is a diversified, Mumbai-based Non-Banking Financial Company (NBFC), registered with the RBI and listed on both NSE & BSE. The company operates across three key verticals - Financial Services, Investments, and Real Estate.

With over 30+ years of experience, Crest Ventures has built a strong presence in capital markets, credit, and real estate development, delivering large-scale residential and commercial projects across India. The organization focuses on strategic investments, risk managed capital allocation, and long-term value creation.

Job Summary

We are looking for a motivated and detail-oriented CA Fresher to join our finance team. The candidate will be responsible for financial reporting, compliance, and supporting strategic initiatives, including demerger-related activities and increased regulatory requirements for a newly listed entity.


Preparation of financial statements in compliance with applicable accounting standards
Data preparation and analysis for financial reporting purposes
Ensure adherence to RBI regulations and compliance requirements
Assist in the demerger of CVL, including documentation and coordination
Manage additional compliance requirements arising from the demerger of CVL
Maintain accurate financial records and ensure timely reporting
Liaise with auditors, consultants, and internal stakeholders


Must-Have Requirements


Qualified Chartered Accountant (CA Fresher)
Strong understanding of financial reporting & accounting standards
Basic knowledge of RBI regulations
Proficiency in MS Excel
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
Attention to detail and deadline orientation

title: Fullstack developer - Remote - Node and React
description:
🖥 Hi,

We are developing an online software 📱 💻 with some developers in India already working for us, whilst our main office is in Europe.




We need a few more persons to work with it on a freelance basis.




This is a long term position, on full time basis.




You will work with 4-5 other developers developing different parts of the software.




Each developer will do the full stack development for its module, i.e. backend, frontend, documentation and testing.

To start with you would be given a certain time frame to complete a module (backend, frontend, testing and documentation) at an agreed price, like for example €1000 for customer register.




Then it goes over to hourly based at EUR 6 per hour, going up over time to EUR 8.5+




If you are a full stack developer with good knowledge of React and Node as well as some Linux server knowledge - then feel free to contact me for more info👍




(Being a fresher is no problem if you are skilled and want to work hard.)

title: Associate/Sr. Associate
description:
Company Description

WNS (Holdings) Limited (NYSE: WNS), is a leading Business Process Management (BPM) company. We combine our deep industry knowledge with technology and analytics expertise to co-create innovative, digital-led transformational solutions with clients across 10 industries. We enable businesses in Travel, Insurance, Banking and Financial Services, Manufacturing, Retail and Consumer Packaged Goods, Shipping and Logistics, Healthcare, and Utilities to re-imagine their digital future and transform their outcomes with operational excellence.We deliver an entire spectrum of BPM services in finance and accounting, procurement, customer interaction services and human resources leveraging collaborative models that are tailored to address the unique business challenges of each client. We co-create and execute the future vision of 400+ clients with the help of our 44,000+ employees.

working knowledge on Farefiling/ PRA/ CRA/ GDS/ Amadeus/Galileo platform will be an added advantage.

title: Higgsfield Graphic Designer_Fresher
description:
This is a Work from Office in Andheri West, Mumbai. 5 days a week. Please read the JD before applying. Apply with your portfolio, applications without portfolio will not be considered. The budget for this role is between INR 6-7 LPA, please apply accordingly.

Please ensure your Behance portfolio link is in your resume.

About SkyBlue Media Group

We are an international media company with operations across Malaysia, Dubai, and India, specializing in creating impactful brand experiences across diverse media platforms. Over the past 15+ years, we have established a strong reputation for innovation, scale, and effectiveness in the OOH and entertainment marketing space.

Our Markets & Expertise


Malaysia – OOH Media Leadership With over 15 years of experience, we are one of Malaysia’s leading OOH media companies, offering a nationwide portfolio of outdoor and transit advertising formats. Our strong partnerships in cinema, retail, and outdoor environments ensure unmatched visibility and brand recall.
Dubai – Transit Media Exclusivity Through SB Mobility Media LLC, we hold the exclusive 5-year rights from Dubai’s Roads & Transport Authority (RTA) to manage bus and transit media. This includes bus exteriors, shelters, stations, and MUPIs, making us a leading player in transit advertising across the UAE.
India – Entertainment & Content Integrations Expanding into the world’s largest film and OTT markets, we are establishing our Mumbai-based operations focused on in-film brand integrations, OTT partnerships, and branded entertainment solutions. Supported by our AI-driven placement and analytics platform, we connect brands with audiences through story-driven content integrations that deliver measurable impact.


View our websites at - https://www.skybluemedia.my/ I https://skybluemedia.ae/

Are you an innovative Graphic Designer ready to make an impact?

We are seeking a creative, detail-oriented Graphic Designer to join our team in Mumbai. This is a full-time, in-office position where you will play a key role in shaping our brand's visual identity and bringing visions to life. If you're passionate about great design, typography, and creating compelling visuals, we want to hear from you.

You need to understand and be using ChatGPT, Higgsfield, Canva or similar tools.

What You'll Do


Brand Guardian: Develop, adapt, and maintain brand identities and guidelines for our company and our clients, ensuring consistency across all platforms and materials.
Presentation Design: Transform complex information into clear, visually engaging presentations that tell a powerful story.
Realistic Mockups: Create professional, true-to-life mockups that effectively showcase design concepts in action.
Social Media Content: Design eye-catching graphics and visuals optimized for various social media platforms to boost our online presence.
UI/UX Support (a plus): Apply fundamental UI/UX principles to create intuitive and visually appealing designs for websites and landing pages.


What We're Looking For


A creative thinker with a strong portfolio showcasing work in branding, presentations, and digital design. Freshers are welcome.
An obsession with typography and a keen eye for visual hierarchy and detail.
The ability to deliver high-quality work efficiently and be a collaborative team player, ensuring projects move forward smoothly and on time.
Proficiency in graphic design software such as Adobe Creative Suite, Canva.
Familiarity with web UI/UX principles and tools like Figma is a definite plus.


Why Join Us?

This is an exciting opportunity to grow your skills and make a significant contribution to our team. You'll work in a supportive and collaborative environment that values creativity and professional development.

Ready to make your mark? Please submit your resume and a link to your portfolio. We look forward to seeing your work!
